description_long: This is a modern athletic sneaker featuring a dynamic color scheme of white, blue, and black. The upper is primarily constructed from white synthetic material with blue mesh panels and black overlays, providing both structure and visual contrast. The shoe has a padded collar and tongue for comfort, and a black pull tab at the heel for easy wearing. The midsole is thick and cushioned, with blue and black accents visible on the outsole, which appears to be made of durable rubber. A small white Nike Swoosh logo is present on the heel, indicating the brand. The lacing system uses white laces in a standard criss-cross pattern, and the overall design suggests a focus on both style and athletic performance.
description: A stylish athletic sneaker with a white, blue, and black color scheme, featuring mesh panels, a cushioned sole, and a visible Nike Swoosh logo on the heel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue mesh panel, black overlays, white laces, and the Nike Swoosh logo on the heel.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the black pull tab, heel structure, and the arrangement of heel overlays and logo.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blue mesh, black overlays, and the overall streamlined shape of the sneaker.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the white laces, black toe overlay, and the rounded toe box.
attribute_logo: White Nike Swoosh on the heel's blue panel
